creator: wgodfrey@ena.com
text:
Solution, or at least work-a-around.  Upgrade BIOS to 2.5.1 from Dell's
website.  The flash floppy will reboot itself at the end of the upgrade
and FreeBSD will lock up again.  However, it appears that after power
cycling the server, the problem goes away.
